reference: Hi, I am a forty-three-year-old female. Approximately three months ago, I had a respiratory lung infection, which has taken a long time to get better. Just recently, I have been becoming increasingly short of breath after experiencing coughing fits and talking. I have tried my husband's inhaler, and this does not help, but when I take a puff of his steroid inhaler, it calms me down.
text: Hi, I am a 43-year-old female. Approximately three months ago, I had a respiratory lung infection, which has taken a long time to get better. Just recently, I have been becoming increasingly short of breath after experiencing coughing fits and talking. I have tried my husband's inhaler, and this does not help. But when I take a puff of his steroid inhaler, it calms me down.
